---
layout: default
title: "Political Maneuvering and Judicial Interventions Ahead of Monsoon Session"
date: 2026-07-16T10:23:04.266357+00:00
summary: "Parliament gears up for the Monsoon Session as the Supreme Court challenges education policies and the TMC faces a fresh resignation blow"
run_time_ist: "3:53PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 3:53PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary tensions:</strong> The Congress party has vowed to oppose the proposed Delimitation Bill and raise concerns regarding Ram temple donations during the upcoming Monsoon Session, while the BJP and Congress intensify their respective legislative strategies.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I26</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I35</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I37</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>TMC leadership crisis:</strong> Trinamool Congress faces a significant setback as Rajya Sabha MP Koel Mallick resigned, marking the fourth departure from the party&#x27;s upper house contingent.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwgFBVV95cUxNVkhmUkFiNVNXaTlUdnd2YjBoV2staXRiaExWaFdMZkJsby00LUV2YWdaRm82OC1XdkNuUzVoQ3VyYk5QNGVmX1NTRG1GXzJwY1MtUmw2WGE0d3J6d2J3VFg2NVBuT1BDOEJNeUlOT1FFVWh0SUZFd05UZC1WTGltc3VZcGZEck9wQmxvZVlPX0Exc1BTby1vS1U3anZWSzAxUHUyVEM3Q0E0aEJkV1AtXzh6NGRPcGVWNVYyNWpGekNEUQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I21</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixgFBVV95cUxQNzVyTVBhZWVyUjM3QVZHZXFoR3hZeGVKeWhtdjlCLW9xN0xjSnZvVFJFR0xZNjI1UDBQNHNqdkhtR1lTQTE0ZGprQnAzQ0xBYmc1cW5zSExsd1BycWlqeWtXbkF3eGx3NmNLZ3E0Z3paT3ZzWlJjTDlHMnFyb1ZyS2xvcVRPYmpPNFFCMXNObXVLQTR2QkEtRGd3Y1dBemNYZWFabHp1LWJzemRvOWM4LUhsaE1qeGZ4NmZHNm5oWTFSSjRiWEE?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I23</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I24</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Supreme Court directives:</strong> The Supreme Court has questioned the Centre&#x27;s three-language policy for Class 9 students due to stress concerns and directed states to establish early release policies for elderly and terminally ill prisoners.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxPMHpBVXAwUzdTUHRqbUhzTVZIT05UbTBkWmpWNzJuY0R6X3NnU21qeFd4N19JYXVrbmI3VzBoMThaWW5EaUVFU3lvZXZGWXhrTzVkMG01M3BfV3EtSnhKejRmaGFlXzVBMHRoUUhGUTJyN3RNMVZhOFNKSUZ0WjB1eFdLNzhoQnRqNXFic29HWHhpWnFHVzRxNWp2NW5OMFlFUm5PdlM1eGR1emphczdoN1YtT0xqdDZoU1JR?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" <h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative and administrative updates:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, while the Election Commission concluded a national conference to coordinate with state commissioners.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W10</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political strategy meetings:</strong> Defence Minister Rajnath Singh is set to lead an NDA strategy meeting to discuss the upcoming session, while the Supreme Court has annulled a Karnataka BJP MLC&#x27;s election, declaring the Congress candidate as the winner.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxPZklUNFdOb3BLUDQ3b3JDMGRGTzlJZjlZQlg0RDJXb09ZNlo3WjJWNDNZUFg0aEt2N3FjZXhhUWthOGhLZ1lLU3B3bTliQXFBbDdjQ2JpRXBFREtHYVJVWnBNWjVHQWlCZGVYVGVYZUVJWXhGYVRLd0hTaEFDaUVYUkctbXQ2cnppQVpsQWFJaWRhZUU4RG12M3FPWEJOUk02dmxmdlp3dUoxbWJqRmFsZ2ctdlVDMmFD?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W4</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwgFBVV95cUxNcmFnRjFGblJCS3BfV0pyODRTb1lpY1pmNkkxSXF4S2tLamJLOEFFZFRidlp1cEhRV19RSjU1NHpZWXpLbURNNTZRV2pqTVpyTmdndmVGQ3JDaXA5eU5fVzhON201U1FpN1Z0YmZGa3hFNWdweWhkVjBsRDJtUjZzbWNuYzR3YmxtZGNRMlhRc2c3a1lCblowZS1iSDk5RFFvOXhlcmF2elRlUFJRYTVLY3hfVXBYcWdRS2ZIaXN5dFlHQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W11</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisgFBVV95cUxOYWRvdkJkajdsZ0NGUWtLNTVlRXBnS2VEcUh4dDBoODlwSlktOUdYXzZpeU51NkI4SE5fRDJka0o1b3FwTi1BaEhudVFJR1VvVjMzY2lacTFPbmV6VUFqMkRpVk9EQVVNZHlsSTM3M2I5dFNDR0R0Q0NmY2FERUNkcWw5ZlFWOFFPM003Wi14cF91SlJvdmt3dnRxenphU3JGWXFXUTNadUtoT1NwWW9SeTh30gG_AUFVX3lxTE1oMVQ5NzhFazF2cFlXSEVra3o4Z0poMWtGYjZhV2hkaHhWS0VrVnlBQ01KOWdoaGRTLUU5NUNBODlIdkd1R3hHeGxrVG9adXJkVVFtZ21Xc3NZS3ZYUmJ5cjJBVjBJZWM5SWdkcVhnMVoxYjJ1dWRCOVFyOU1uUVVlZGNncGNJVUV5MEZQNlZyZE1SbU80Y2E2YXlGTUNabndVaFZoNGtjRnN0YUtHZ0VSTUNhVFIyUVY3VG9UajQ0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W14</a></span></li>
